indications_and_usage: Use For the treatment of acne
dosage_and_administration: Directions cleanse the skin thoroughly before applying medication cover the entire affected area with a thin layer 1 to 3 times daily because excessive drying of the skin may occur, start with 1 application daily, then gradually increase to 2 or 3 times daily if needed or as directed by a doctor if bothersome dryness or peeling occurs, reduce application to once a day or every other day for children under 10 years of age and under, consult your physician
